headline: McKinsey Publishes Agentic AI Healthcare Report
summary: McKinsey published a major report positioning agentic AI as healthcare's next automation wave, defining it as autonomous systems that execute complex workflows like care coordination and prior authorization without human intervention.
so_what: McKinsey is positioning agentic AI as the next healthcare transformation wave. This gives consulting firms a framework to sell AI strategy engagements.
original_title: Generative AI in healthcare: Adoption matures as agentic AI emerges
